'''竏喃-sh-w-j''' ('''kafashwejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waken|waken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waken|waken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-sh-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kafashwejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifashwejoko|thifashwejoko]] || [[word:jifashwejoko|jifashwejoko]] || [[word:shifashwejoko|shifashwejoko]] || [[word:kifashwejoko|kifashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufashwejoko|thuthufashwejoko]] || [[word:jujufashwejoko|jujufashwejoko]] || [[word:shushufashwejoko|shushufashwejoko]] || [[word:kukufashwejoko|kukufashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufashwejoko|thufashwejoko]] || [[word:jufashwejoko|jufashwejoko]] || [[word:shufashwejoko|shufashwejoko]] || [[word:kufashwejoko|kufashwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufashwejoko|thufashwejoko]] || [[word:jufashwejoko|jufashwejoko]] || [[word:shufashwejoko|shufashwejoko]] || [[word:kufashwejoko|kufashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefashwejoko|thefashwejoko]] || [[word:jefashwejoko|jefashwejoko]] || [[word:shefashwejoko|shefashwejoko]] || [[word:kefashwejoko|kefashwejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofashwejoko|thofashwejoko]] || [[word:jofashwejoko|jofashwejoko]] || [[word:shofashwejoko|shofashwejoko]] || [[word:kofashwejoko|kofashwejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofashwejoko|thofashwejoko]] || [[word:jofashwejoko|jofashwejoko]] || [[word:shofashwejoko|shofashwejoko]] || [[word:kofashwejoko|kofashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦfashwejoko|thﾃｦfashwejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦfashwejoko|jﾃｦfashwejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦfashwejoko|shﾃｦfashwejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦfashwejoko|kﾃｦfashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafashwejoko|thathafashwejoko]] || [[word:jajafashwejoko|jajafashwejoko]] || [[word:shashafashwejoko|shashafashwejoko]] || [[word:kakafashwejoko|kakafashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafashwejoko|thafashwejoko]] || [[word:jafashwejoko|jafashwejoko]] || [[word:shafashwejoko|shafashwejoko]] || [[word:kafashwejoko|kafashwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafashwejoko|thafashwejoko]] || [[word:jafashwejoko|jafashwejoko]] || [[word:shafashwejoko|shafashwejoko]] || [[word:kafashwejoko|kafashwejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
